title: Notion Task Manager
description: Takes a strategy brief or user request and creates structured tasks in Notion. Exercises Notion create/update/search.

nodes.title: Describe Tasks
nodes.prompt: Ask the user: what tasks should be created? Suggest: (A) Create tasks from a strategy brief I'll paste, (B) Set up a content calendar in Notion, (C) Create a campaign task list with deadlines, (D) Custom task list.

nodes.title: Parse Tasks
nodes.prompt: Parse the user's request into structured tasks. Each task needs: title, description, priority (high/medium/low), status (to-do), and assignee if specified.

nodes.title: Create in Notion
nodes.prompt: Find the Task Database in Notion, then create a page for each task with the correct properties. Return the page URLs.

nodes.title: Review Tasks
nodes.prompt: Show the user the created Notion tasks with their URLs. Ask: (A) Looks good, (B) Add more tasks, (C) Edit specific tasks, (D) Delete and redo.

nodes.title: Apply Updates
nodes.prompt: Apply any user-requested updates to the Notion tasks.
